title: feuilleea ferrugineohirta
intro: Feuilleea ferrugineohirta, also known as the rusty-haired feuilleea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It is native to India and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant contains various bioactive compounds, including alkaloids and flavonoids, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, contributing to its health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory conditions. Feuilleea ferrugineohirta can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to soothe coughs and relieve congestion.
